'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 99''' was the ninety-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[November 19]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] Threat
*[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Isolder]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Gragra/Legends|Gragra]] the [[Gorgmonger/Legends|Gorgmonger]]
*[[Hugo Eckener/Legends|Hugo Eckener]]
*[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]
*[[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]]
*[[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star]] - [[Emperor's throne room#Death Star II|Throne Room]]
*[[J1M]] (Jaywun-Emm)
*[[:Category:Tools|Hand tools]]
*[[Dooku/Legends|Count Dooku's]] [[Speeder bike/Legends|speeder bike]] ([[Flitknot speeder/Legends|Flitknot speeder]])
